examples: One puffer fish has enough toxins to kill about 30 humans.
There are total 120 kinds of puffer fish all over the world.
There are over ninety species of puffer-fish all belonging to the family Tetraodontidae.
Or how about a puffer vest with deep armholes to wear over your pinstripes?
That makes identifying and testing open reading-frames much easier, so lots of puffer-fish genes are known.
